# ewancroft.uk

> Personal website of Ewan Croft — student, developer, and writer.

ewancroft.uk is the personal website of Ewan Croft, a UK-based student, developer, and writer. It serves as a personal hub showing his current status, recent Bluesky posts, music listening activity, recent Standard.site documents, and links to his projects and writing.

## About Ewan

Ewan Croft is a UK-based student, developer, and writer building open-source tools around the AT Protocol/Bluesky ecosystem. He writes poetry and short fiction (available as Ko-fi commissions), has an interest in Scottish Gaelic, and self-hosts on NixOS. Active on Bluesky at @ewancroft.uk.

## Pages

- /: Home — profile card, latest Bluesky post, music status (Teal.fm), mood status (Kibun), recent Standard.site documents, supporters, and Popfeed reviews
- /[slug]: Blog posts and essays
- /archive: Full post archive
- /support: Support page (Ko-fi and GitHub Sponsors)
- /work: Work and projects overview
- /site: Site colophon and technical information

## Projects

Ewan's open-source tools are hosted on croft.click:
- Jasper (jasper.croft.click): Instagram → Grain/Spark on ATProto
- Malachite (malachite.croft.click): Last.fm, Spotify, Apple Music, and YouTube Music → Teal on ATProto
- Bismuth (bismuth.croft.click): Standard.site documents → Markdown
- Opal (opal.croft.click): Twitter/Mastodon/Threads/Nostr → Bluesky
- Tourmaline (tourmaline.croft.click): Teal.fm scrobble analyser

## Commissions

Poetry from £10, short stories from £20, SvelteKit websites from £100. Via Ko-fi: https://ko-fi.com/ewancroft

## Source

https://github.com/ewanc26/website

## Contact

Bluesky: https://witchsky.app/profile/ewancroft.uk
Support him: https://ewancroft.uk/support
